org.episteme.core.measure.quantity.Mass

Packages that use Mass
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.measure
Implements a comprehensive units framework enabling type-safe
org.episteme.core.measure.quantity
Defines interfaces for physical quantities, organized by
org.episteme.core.measure.units

org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.G
    Alias for GRAM
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.GRAM
    Gram: 1 g = 0.001 kg
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.KG
    Alias for KILOGRAM
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.KILOGRAM
    The SI unit of mass: kilogram (kg).
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.MILLIGRAM
    Milligram: 1 mg = 10ГѓВўГ‚ВЃГ‚В»ГѓВўГ‚ВЃГ‚В¶ kg
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.OUNCE
    Ounce: 1 oz = 0.028349523125 kg
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.POUND
    Pound (mass): 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg (exactly)
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.TONNE
    Tonne (metric ton): 1 t = 1000 kg
    static final Unit<Mass>
    Units.UNIFIED_ATOMIC_MASS
    The Unified Atomic Mass Unit: u (Dalton). 1 u = 1.66053906660e-27 kg.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Real
    BodyMetrics.bmi(Quantity<Mass> mass, Quantity<Length> height)
    BMI = mass (kg) / heightГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВІ (mГѓЖ’Гўв‚¬ЕЎГѓвЂљГ‚ВІ)

    Du Bois BSA formula: BSA = 0.007184 * w^0.425 * h^0.725
    static Real
    BodyMetrics.bsaMosteller(Quantity<Mass> mass, Quantity<Length> height)
    Mosteller BSA: sqrt(weight * height / 3600)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Real
    DoseCalculator.clarksRule(Real adultDoseMg, Quantity<Mass> childWeight)
    Clark's rule: Child dose = (weight_lbs / 150) * adult_dose

    Plasma concentration after single IV bolus dose.

    Steady-state average concentration with repeated dosing.
    static Real
    DoseCalculator.weightBasedDose(Real dosePerKg, Quantity<Mass> weight)
    Weight-based dose: dose = dosePerKg * weight

    Description

    Method
    Description

    RelativisticMechanics.kineticEnergy(Quantity<Mass> restMass, Quantity<Velocity> v)

    static Quantity<Mass>
    RelativisticMechanics.relativisticMass(Quantity<Mass> restMass, Quantity<Velocity> v)
    Calculates Relativistic Mass. m = gamma * rest_mass

    RelativisticMechanics.relativisticMomentum(Quantity<Mass> restMass, Quantity<Velocity> v)
